title: senecio haygarthii
intro: Senecio haygarthii, also known as Haygarth's ragwort, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant contains a group of compounds called pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Senecio haygarthii is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting infection, and supporting respiratory health. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or tincture, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity from the pyrrolizidine alkaloids.
